description: MCP bridge for autonomous x402 payments in HPP USDC.e — discover and pay for services per call.
name: io.github.hpp-io/x402-mcp-bridge

environmentVariables.description: Delegate EOA private key used to sign payments. Auto-created in the OS keychain if unset.
environmentVariables.name: DELEGATE_PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Target network: eip155:181228 (HPP Sepolia, default) or eip155:190415 (HPP Mainnet).
environmentVariables.name: HPP_NETWORK

environmentVariables.description: Optional upstream MCP server to proxy. Omit to expose only the local tools.
environmentVariables.name: RESOURCE_SERVER_URL

environmentVariables.description: Safe address for governance (Safe) mode. Set together with ALLOWANCE_MODULE_ADDRESS.
environmentVariables.name: SAFE_ADDRESS

environmentVariables.description: Safe AllowanceModule address for governance (Safe) mode. Set together with SAFE_ADDRESS.
environmentVariables.name: ALLOWANCE_MODULE_ADDRESS

title: HPP x402 MCP Bridge
